name: get_datasource
description: Retrieve entries from a datasource by its slug. Datasources in Storyblok are collections of key-value pairs used for dropdowns, select fields, configuration values, and reusable option lists (e.g., country codes, color options, category lists). Each entry has a name (display label) and a value. Datasources can also be dimensioned for multi-language support. This uses the CDN API and requires a space access token.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Your space's access token (preview or public).

parameters.name: datasource
parameters.description: The slug of the datasource to retrieve entries from (e.g., 'countries', 'colors', 'categories').

parameters.name: dimension
parameters.description: The dimension (language/variant) to retrieve entries for. Returns the default dimension values if omitted.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of entries per page. Maximum 1000. Defaults to 25.
